title: Wakala Wasl — Agency & CRM Platform
description: Delivered a full agency platform with 4+ automated workflows covering services, client requests, inquiry tracking, and follow‑ups. Built CRM‑style features for communication, request handling, and real‑time follow‑up tracking.

title: Lawandy Motors — Engineering Platform
description: Designed and built a company platform showcasing 5+ engineering areas including propulsion, clean energy, and intelligent systems. Structured 4+ investor‑facing content sections for clarity, credibility, and seamless navigation.

title: Dragon LMS — Learning Management System
description: Full‑stack LMS supporting 3 user roles — students, instructors, and admins. Implemented dashboard workflows for progress tracking, content management, and educational automation.

title: E‑Commerce Platform
description: Architected a scalable backend with 5+ modules — products, orders, authentication, users, and payments. Implemented 3 secure order workflows using clean architecture and service layers.

title: Real Estate Platform
description: Engineered a real estate platform covering buying, renting, and property investment. Designed 4 browsing flows including property search, filtering, details viewing, and inquiry navigation.

title: Dalelak — Mobile Shopping Guide
description: Graduation project: a Flutter mobile app with 3 core flows for product search, location comparison, and smart shopping guidance. Designed user‑focused journeys for faster discovery across purchasing points.
